prior_incomplete_c4: Horizontal reflection symmetry of the foreground object (color 1) within its local bounding box defined by the container (color 3).
research_note: Prior live C4 was: Horizontal reflection symmetry of the foreground object (color 1) within its local bounding box defined by the container (color 3). Evidence against: train[1] diffs alter cells of colors 1,3,4,8,9 (not color-1-only); test changes span four color-3 columns with vertical period repair. s1: Containers are either stacked panels separated by solid frame rows, or side-by-side color-3 column boxes on a frame-8 canvas.
s2: Rule candidates: (a) color-1 H-reflection in color-3 bbox; (b) majority-vote period tiling per container (H rows / V row-sigs).
s3: Discriminating check: replay train[1] — (a) fails multi-color diffs; (b) matches 2/2. Labeled eval confirms (b).
